step_by_step_thinking:
The best method to prevent cross-infection in a post-operative ICU setting involves focusing on hygiene practices rather than systemic measures like giving antibiotics broadly or fumigating the entire environment. Proper hand washing reduces the transmission of pathogens effectively between healthcare providers and patients.
\boxed{D} Based on the context given about post-operative infections and the focus on prevention methods, practicing proper hand washing stands out as the most practical and effective strategy compared to mass medication administration or environmental disinfections.
